summary: Config cleanup and hardcodes — runtime knobs that should be config-driven

resolution.note: All 9 children closed. Configurable knobs added: [provider].timeout, [retrieval].max_concept_walks, [retrieval].concept_match_min_word_len, [ranking].vector_weight, [ranking].graph_weight, [processing].timeout (embedding). Centralized: guru/paths.py, llm.ollama_embed_url(). Bug fixes: dual TIER_WEIGHTS source removed, ModelProvider raises on missing config.model. 109 unit tests + 4 chunking tests pass.
